news.title: U.S.-Iran talks set to begin in Pakistani capital after delegations arrive
news.summary: Pakistan confirmed the arrival of Iran's parliament speaker and foreign minister ahead of talks with a U.S. delegation led by Vice President JD Vance.

news.title: Berkshire electric utility's court win could save it billions
news.summary: PacifiCorp court win could reduce wildfire damages by $1 billion or more.

news.title: How Kodak is trying to turn around its business after teetering on bankruptcy
news.summary: Photography company Eastman Kodak has seen its fair share of financial struggles, but CEO Jim Continenza is determined to fuel its success.

news.title: US Navy Ships Crossed Strait of Hormuz on Saturday,  Axios Says
news.summary: Several US navy ships crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday in a move that wasn’t coordinated with Iran, Axios reported, citing a US official it didn’t identify.

news.title: Zambia’s Cabinet Approves Revised 2026 Budget as Fuel Costs Jump
news.summary: Zambia’s cabinet has approved a revised budget for 2026 to address revenue pressures arising from the conflict in the Middle East.

news.title: By The Way | Buzzballs, Masters Garden Gnomes, HOA Fees
news.summary: Catch up on all the headlines with BTW. Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini and Tim Stenovec dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sun

news.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
news.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

news.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
news.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

news.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
news.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

news.title: US and Iranian delegations meet Pakistani prime minister ahead of talks
news.summary: Tehran and Washington have never held direct bilateral negotiations

news.title: The S&P 500’s woes in Trump 2.0
news.summary: The index has had its worst performance over the past five US presidencies

news.title: The damage wrought on the Middle East’s oil and gas supplies
news.summary: Saudi Arabia and Qatar have both suffered significant damage to production capacity during the US-Israeli war against Iran
